subject: Gaming
title: The Battlefront II Loot Box Revolt
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Battlefront II Loot Box Revolt.

hook.text: EA charged $60 for a game then locked heroes behind paywalls. The internet exploded with the biggest backlash ever.

buildup.text: Star Wars Battlefront II launched with a pay-to-win loot box system. Darth Vader required 40 hours to unlock.

discovery.text: EA's Reddit defense became the most downvoted comment in history—over 683,000 downvotes.

twist.text: The backlash reached governments. Belgium and the Netherlands investigated loot boxes as gambling.

climax.text: EA removed the system entirely. Player outrage proved that consumers can force billion-dollar companies to change.

punchline.text: 683,000 downvotes. Governments investigated. Players forced EA to retreat.

quiz.question: How many downvotes did EA's Reddit comment defending Battlefront II receive?
